# warn.forgemesh.io - Disruption Intelligence
> Geospatial disruption intelligence API built from WARN filings, labor signals, and regional economic events.
> Hosted API: https://warn.forgemesh.io

## Public Discovery
GET /health - Service availability
GET /stats - Aggregate reported-event statistics
GET /events?state={state} - Bounded event previews
GET /sources - Public source provenance
GET /openapi.json - API contract
GET /.well-known/x402.json - Live x402 payment discovery

## Paid Intelligence
GET /events/:id/severity - $0.01 - Event severity signal
GET /events/:id/history - $0.02 - Event history
GET /events/:id/relationships - $0.02 - Related events
GET /events/:id/timeline - $0.05 - Event timeline
GET /events/:id/company-intel - $0.03 - Company context for an event
GET /companies/search - $0.01 - Company search
GET /companies/:id - $0.05 - Company profile
GET /companies/:id/intelligence - $0.05 - Company intelligence
GET /radius/:zip - $0.05 - Geographic radius intelligence
GET /territory/:zip/disruption - $0.10 - Territory disruption summary
GET /regions/:state - $0.02 - Regional summaries
GET /regions/:state/:county - $0.01 - County summary
GET /jurisdictions - $0.02 - Jurisdiction summaries
GET /jurisdictions/:state - $0.01 - Jurisdiction summary

## Payment
Use the live endpoint response or hosted discovery manifest for current x402 payment terms.
